[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010010 2
1 11000000 2
2 10110001 4
3 10110110 5
4 11011011 6
5 10110100 4
6 11010101 5
7 10110001 4

01 11111000 5
12 00101101 4
23 10001110 4
34 11111000 5
45 10000111 4
56 10010111 5
67 01001100 3
70 11111111 a

02 00101010 3
13 01011100 4
24 10001001 3
35 10000000 1
46 11101111 7

71 11111000 5
